name: Evolution Golf Simulator
address: 141 S Opdyke Rd, Auburn Hills, MI 48326
about: Evolution Sportsplex is a comprehensive indoor sports facility located in Auburn Hills, MI, featuring a 92,500 sq. ft. multi-purpose dome with artificial turf, allowing for year-round training and play. The venue specializes in golf with an indoor driving range, multiple golf simulators, and professional instruction, while also accommodating a variety of other sports like soccer, baseball, softball, football, and lacrosse. With 3 batting cages, a 6,000 sq. ft. event rental building, and a full concession stand, it offers a versatile space for both individual practice and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor driving range and simulators available year-round regardless of weather
Professional golf lessons with advanced launch monitor technology (Foresight GCQuad)
Comprehensive facility with multiple amenities including batting cages and event spaces
Flexible booking options for both practice and competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitor used for lessons and possibly simulators

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue likely has club rentals available. Contact them directly for specifics.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not explicitly stated, but the venue has a full concession stand available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator time varies, but typically 18 holes takes about 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Evolution Sportsplex is family-friendly with activities for various sports and a welcoming atmosphere for all ages.
